summary:
All tests passed! 

**The needle:** In `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`, the `proxy_pass` directive was pointing to port **5001** (`http://127.0.0.1:5001`), but the Flask backend (`server.py`) runs on port **5000**. This caused nginx to fail when proxying requests to `/api/data`.

**The fix:** Changed `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` → `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;` to match the actual Flask backend port.
